name: BurgerFi

identity.name: BurgerFi
identity.location: National BurgerFi menu scope; no packet-specific location supplied
identity.notes: Official BurgerFi domain and menu identity confirmed; no ambiguous location was merged.

restaurantLevelAllergenEvidence.text: Official guide states wheat, egg, soy and dairy are made in the same kitchen; individual items may contact one another; gluten cross-contact occurs in frying.

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.

products.name: Cookies & Cream with Oreo Custard Shake
Cookies & Cream with Oreo Custard Treat

notes: Coordinator terminal catalog derived from validated Luna research and serialized APPLY output.

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Current official nutrition catalog matching the frozen food and nonalcoholic product scope.
Official matrix lists direct allergen positives and PC markers, including sesame; it also states shared-kitchen and frying cross-contact.
Current food and nonalcoholic menu surface; alcohol excluded.

notes: POC worker artifacts persisted by the root coordinator.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
verificationCommands: recompute Ingredient Intelligence after direct finalization
run twice and compare owned bytes
